overall.description: A third-person perspective follows a character through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, beginning in a neon-lit commercial plaza with digital billboards, ascending through a building interior, and concluding with driving a sports car through a parking garage. The scene features wet reflective surfaces from rain, vibrant neon lighting, and high-quality ray-traced visuals characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with towering digital billboards and neon ground lighting

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the neon-lit plaza, passing other pedestrians and digital advertisements

entered.detail: tall building facade covered with large digital billboards and neon accents
continuous cyan neon light strip running along the ground edge
large illuminated advertising screen displaying colorful graphics
tree with illuminated trunk and branches
row of bright yellow automated vending machines

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide-open commercial plaza at night, surrounded by towering buildings covered in digital billboards and neon lighting. The wet asphalt reflects the cyan ground lights and colorful advertisements. Sparse pedestrians move through the space, including one with an umbrella and others near vending machines.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered elevated walkway with color-changing illuminated ceiling panels

events.description: ascends concrete stairs from open plaza into covered upper walkway

agents.ego_description: climbing stairs to upper level while passing pedestrians descending in the opposite direction

entered.detail: wide concrete staircase with metal railings leading upward
overhead panels cycling through yellow, red, pink, and blue colors
building entrance with glass doors and security checkpoint

segments.scene_description: The character transitions from the open plaza to a semi-covered stairway, ascending to an elevated walkway. The ceiling features large illuminated panels that shift colors dynamically. The space becomes more enclosed with building walls on either side, and the character passes a pedestrian descending the stairs.

scene_state.functional_zone: corporate building interior with security checkpoint and metal stairwell

events.description: enters building through security checkpoint area with glass doors
begins ascending interior metal staircase with glass railings

agents.ego_description: passing through the security checkpoint and lobby, then climbing the interior staircase toward the upper levels

entered.detail: security booth with green neon signage reading SECURITY
automatic glass doors with orange neon trim
metal staircase with open risers and glass railings
black metal handrails along the staircase

segments.scene_description: The character enters the building interior, passing a security kiosk with glowing green signage and glass doors with orange neon trim. The environment shifts to an enclosed indoor space with marble floors. The character then ascends a metal staircase with glass railings, moving through the building's upper levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-level parking garage with futuristic vehicles and exit ramps

events.description: exits building interior into dimly lit parking garage with parked vehicles
approaches and enters black futuristic sports car, transitioning to driving perspective

agents.ego_description: walking through the parking garage to a parked sports car, entering it, and driving through the structure toward the exit

notable_agents.action: black Mizutani sports car being entered and driven by ego character

entered.detail: concrete parking structure with multiple levels and exposed beams
futuristic black sports car with Mizutani branding
large structural support column in parking area
upward ramp leading out of the parking garage with light at the end

segments.scene_description: The character exits the building into a narrow enclosed parking garage with wet asphalt and concrete pillars. After approaching a parked black sports car, the character enters the vehicle and begins driving through the garage. The scene transitions from walking to driving as the car moves toward the exit ramp, with neon lights from the city visible in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a sprawling, neon-lit commercial plaza into the enclosed depths of a futuristic building and finally into a dim parking garage. It begins by tracking the character across wet asphalt reflecting cyan lights and towering digital billboards before moving toward a semi-covered stairway. As the character ascends to an elevated walkway under shifting illuminated panels, the scene shifts indoors, passing a security kiosk with glowing green signage and climbing a metal staircase over polished marble floors. The camera then follows the character as they exit the building into a narrow concrete garage with wet surfaces and heavy pillars. Finally, the perspective shifts from walking to driving as the character enters a black sports car and accelerates toward an exit ramp with the distant city lights shimmering ahead.
